builder_app_entry.role: Registers Builder frontend routes in the application module boot flow.
builder_app_entry.notes: Should stay narrow and only register Builder Studio UI routes.

routes_file.role: Defines Builder Studio index and detail routes.
routes_file.notes: Routes are UI-only and do not expose publish behavior.

service_file.role: Thin client for Builder Definition backend Control Plane endpoints.
service_file.notes: Must not add publish/write-capable methods during MVP.

views.name: BuilderDefinitionsIndex
views.role: Lists definitions and creates a neutral draft.
views.notes: Demo entrypoint. Should explain create, edit, validate, and preview flow.

views.name: BuilderDefinitionView
views.role: Coordinates visual definition editing, section navigation, raw JSON synchronization, save, validate, and preview.
views.notes: Owns definitionJson and definitionText synchronization. Includes demo navigation. Must not expose publish.

components.name: BuilderDefinitionSummary
components.role: Sidebar summary for module/entity/resource, field count, relation count, capability count, status, and safety labels.
components.notes: Presentation only. Reinforces Preview-only MVP, No publish, and No runtime writes.

components.name: BuilderModuleIdentityForm
components.role: Visual editor for module and resource identity.
components.notes: May suggest derived names but must not force overwrite after user edits.

components.name: BuilderFieldsEditor
components.role: Visual editor for fields, validation rules, visibility, and table metadata.
components.notes: Must use neutral placeholder field names only and avoid fixed business defaults.

components.name: BuilderCapabilitiesEditor
components.notes: Future/warning-only capabilities must be clearly labeled.

components.name: BuilderFormLayoutEditor
components.role: Visual editor for definition_json.formLayout sections, field placement, stepper metadata, and conditional visibility metadata.
components.notes: Metadata editor only. Runtime renderer and publish remain future work.

components.name: BuilderAutomationEditor
components.role: Visual editor for definition_json.automation workflows, triggers, conditions, and action metadata.
components.notes: Metadata only. No runtime workflow, email, task, approval, webhook, or publish execution.

components.name: BuilderRelationsEditor
components.notes: Only belongsTo and hasMany are MVP relation types. Other relation types are warning-only.

components.name: BuilderRawJsonEditor
components.role: Debug and recovery raw JSON editor.
components.notes: Invalid JSON must not be applied silently.

components.name: BuilderValidationPreviewPanel
components.role: Displays actions, validation report, warnings, preview status, readiness report, and dry-run review entry.
components.notes: Emits save, validate, preview, readiness, and dry-run events to the parent view. Must not expose publish.

components.name: BuilderPublishDryRunReview
components.role: Read-only review browser for publish dry-run artifacts, safety checklist, informational approval checklist, next allowed actions, and forbidden actions.
components.notes: Review only. No approval persistence, publish action, or copy-to-runtime action.

components.name: BuilderPublishCandidateSnapshot
components.role: Read-only browser for control-plane publish candidate snapshots, checklist items, next allowed actions, and forbidden actions.
components.notes: Snapshot only. No approval persistence, publish action, or copy-to-runtime action.

components.name: BuilderPublishApprovalRequests
components.role: Displays persisted candidate approval requests, audit events, and human review actions.
components.notes: Approval does not publish. UI labels must avoid Publish, Deploy, and Copy to runtime actions.

components.name: BuilderApprovedCandidatePreflight
components.role: Displays the read-only approved candidate preflight report, blockers, warnings, checks, and safety flags.
components.notes: Preflight does not publish and must not expose runtime write actions.

components.name: BuilderPublishExecutionRecords
components.role: Displays control-plane publish execution preparation records and creates new lock/preflight/staging/rollback-manifest draft records.
components.notes: Execution record only. Must not expose Publish, Execute Publish, Deploy, Rollback, Copy to runtime, or Run migrations actions.
